name: frankensqlite

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp site/spec-evolution/visualization_of_the_evolution_of_the_frankensqlite_specs_document_from_inception.html dist/index.html && cp site/spec-evolution/frankentui.css site/spec-evolution/spec_evolution_v1.sqlite3 site/spec-evolution/spec_evolution_v1.sqlite3.config.json site/spec-evolution/og-image.png site/spec-evolution/twitter-image.png site/spec-evolution/frankensqlite_illustration.webp site/spec-evolution/frankensqlite_diagram.webp site/spec-evolution/_headers site/spec-evolution/_routes.json dist/
scripts.build:wasm-browser: npm run build --workspace @frankensqlite/worker && npm run build --workspace @frankensqlite/sdk
scripts.typecheck:wasm-browser: npm run typecheck --workspace @frankensqlite/worker && npm run typecheck --workspace @frankensqlite/sdk
scripts.test:wasm-browser: npm run test --workspace @frankensqlite/worker && npm run test --workspace @frankensqlite/sdk
